entry.title: Re: ChaRM Public API´s not Found
entry.content:
Hi Marcos,

We don't have explicit APIs from ChaRM side for integration with 3rd party tools. This kind of integration requirement needs to involve consulting service usually. Thus turn to SAP consult service is an option for you for your specific requirement.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Case statement in webi report throwing error
entry.content:
- simplify your multiple-cases-and-values-statement to check if the syntax of a single part is ok and working !
- what is that supposed to do  "end = 1"  ?

entry.title: Re: ****Cross Tab Table alignment formatting help Require...
entry.content:
- set the page-layout to "fit on 1 page"
- set the page-layout to show more than X (default = 20) columns on one page
- set the the width of the number-columns to "automatic" to show the huge numbers

entry.title: Re: Why "BI Admin Cockpit" is not available in SAP BO. Ho...
entry.content: what do you mean with "not available" ?

entry.title: Re: There is a difference between the document total and...
entry.content: Thanks Ankit, Yes, it was my colleague raising the incident.

entry.title: Re: REUSE_ALV_LIST_DISPLAY and REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY
entry.content:
I need to add more text in the top_of_page, but if I add more text in the top_of_page the screen will become like this
80% height for top of page and 20% for the item report list

currently the top_of_page height is not adjustable

so my solution is to change the REUSE_ALV_LIST_DISPLAY to REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY  so the height of top_of_page will become adjustable (see image below)



but my problem is the current design of ALV_LIST , I am not sure if this kind of design is possible in ALV_GRID_DISPLAY


for this object CL_SALV_TABLE
i did not use this because I will need to do more code changes

entry.title: Introduce more about linking vendor and customer to same Business Partner
entry.content:
During migrate your system from ECC to HANA, we need to synchronize all customer and vendor to BP. One of the situation is if the customer and vendor are same entity, we need to link them to same Business Partner.

Error R1367

In the past, we always receive below error:

Consistency error: 
Message no. R1367

This is because our system is checking below:

        a. The Customer and Vendor must be linked through the Customer number field in the Vendor table and the Vendor number field in the customer table.
        b. If the Customer and Vendor have the same Bank Account information (same Country, Bank Key and Bank Account), then the remaining fields for this entry must also match.
        c. The customer and vendor must contain exactly the same Postal Address information.The following fields are also checked :

ADDR_VERSPO_W_O_NOLANGUPCODE1_EXT
FROM_DATEPO_BOX_CITLANGU_ISOPCODE2_EXT
TO_DATEPBOXCIT_NOREGIONPCODE3_EXT
TITLEPO_BOX_REGSORT1PO_BOX
NAMEPOBOX_CTRYSORT2FLOOR
NAME_2PO_CTRYISOEXTENS_1ROOM_NO
NAME_3DELIV_DISEXTENS_2COUNTRY
NAME_4TRANSPZONETIME_ZONECOUNTRYISO
CONV_NAMESTREETTAXJURCODEDELI_SERV_TYPE
C_O_NAMESTREET_NOADDRESS_IDDELI_SERV_NUMBER
CITYSTR_ABBRLANGU_CRCOUNTY_CODE
DISTRICTHOUSE_NOLANGUCRISOCOUNTY
CITY_NOHOUSE_NO2COMM_TYPETOWNSHIP_CODE
DISTRCT_NOHOUSE_NO3ADDR_GROUPTOWNSHIP
CHCKSTATUSSTR_SUPPL1HOME_CITY 
REGIOGROUPSTR_SUPPL2HOMECITYNO 
POSTL_COD1STR_SUPPL3DONT_USE_S 
POSTL_COD2LOCATIONDONT_USE_P 
POSTL_COD3BUILDINGPO_BOX_LOBBY 

If any of above does not meet the requirement, error will occurs.

Improvement of error R1367

Then we have below note which improve the error message.

3088419 - DDIC for Legal Entity BAdI Message (367) Enhancements   

3067086 - Legal Entity BAdI Message (367) Enhancements   

The error message will show in below way:

CVI_LEDH

We also develop a functionality so that we can select the leading object instead of manually change every difference field between customer and vendor.

To realize this functionality, please implement below note :

 3072319 - Legal Entity - Data Harmonization (CVI_LE_DATA_HARMONIZATION) Report

 3088771 - DDIC Changes for Legal Entity - Data Harmonization (CVI_LE_DATA_HARMONIZATION) Report

 3082146 - Legal Entity - Data Harmonization (CVI_LE_DATA_HARMONIZATION) Report integration in CVI_CO...

 3081338 - Legal Entity - Data Harmonization (CVI_LE_DATA_HARMONIZATION) Report integration into MDS...

 Then let us look into CVI_LEDH

  • The difference between customer and vendor will get checked in t-code CVI_LEDH, it including address check, tax check, and bank check.

  • If both of the customer and vendor does not synchronize to BP yet, they will get shown in the result of CVI_LEDH.
  • We can select the leading object, which means during synchronize from customer and vendor to BP, the BP will use the data from customer or from vendor. For example, for the sample customer MYCUST71 and vendor MYVEND71, I select customer as leading object for address data, and vendor as leading object for bank data.
  • After selecting, please press save button.

Let us see what will happen during synchronization:

Sample customer MYCUST71, does not maintain bank data.

Sample vendor MYVEND71, maintain one bank data.

And the synchronization options set up in below way.

  • After vendor synchronize to BP, currently the customer does not synchronize to BP. Re-run the t-code, the customer MYCUST71 and vendor MYVEND71 (LIEF) will no longer there.

  • If checking into table CVI_LEDH, we can get below record:

  • Bp has the bank data which get synchronized from vendor

  • Run MDS_LOAD_Cockpit to synchronize customer to BP. The BP then has both customer role and vendor role. And bank data keep no changes.
     

     

  • Customer still does not have bank data

  • At this time, when looking into table CVI_LEDH, the status keeps 03.

     

  • Then I re-run t-code CVI_LEDH, the status change to 05

     

  • Let us see if we change any data at customer side. 

    BP name get changed, but the bank data keeps


     

     

  • If we try to add a new bank data to customer. After it synchronize to BP, it behaves below

     

 Conclusion

You can see that after using functionality CVI_LEDH, if there are difference between customer and vendor, we can select one of it as leading object, after both of them get synchronized to BP, it will not change the data which didn't get selected as leading object. In this case, vendor has same bank information as BP, but customer still keep no bank data.

Please also follow below steps, to make sure customer, vendor and BP data are same.

MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT: Business Partner -> Customer
a. Select only Business Partners where customer and vendor are merged into.
b. This step is to synchronize the address, tax data, and bank details of the Business
Partner to the Customer.
c. This step is also required to link the previous vendor Contact Person to customer

MDS_LOAD_COCKPIT: Business Partner -> Vendor
a. Select only Business Partners where customer and vendor are merged into.
b. This step is to synchronize the address, tax data, and bank details of the Business
Partner to the Vendor.
c. This step is also required to link the previous customer Contact Person to vendor

Best regards

sherry

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud emails @mail.crm.cloud.sap not getting out
entry.content:
Hello experts!

We have trying out the SAP Sales Cloud version2 and hoping to see if anyone would know why we are not able to get emails from @mail.crm.cloud.sap .  What needs to be done at our end in order to get these emails successfully?  Also wanting to see if SAP has done the required steps to ensure this domain can have a higher delivery rate?  I guess it is reasonable for normal mail servers to think this domain would be some kind of issues. 

Many thanks in advance!

Marcos

What I am expecting is to make a field as import parameter with SPos just like DDIC search help does, so that this field can be restricted to a imported value and is read-only in the search condition of the search help.

Regards,

Ming

entry.title: Manage SAP HANA Cloud instance on BTP using BTP CLI
entry.content:
SAP HANA Cloud instances (other environments) can be created and managed using the BTP CLI.

This blog is summarizing the common operations.

Please note: SAP HANA Cloud instances provisioned in the cloud foundry environment cannot be managed by BTP CLI at the time of writing. 

Check my other blog for managing instances in cloud foundry environment.
Manage SAP HANA Cloud instance on BTP using Cloud Foundry CLI 

Prerequisite:

  • Install the BTP CLI on your local machine
  • HANA Cloud Entitlement added in the subaccount
  • Subscribed the hana tools in your subaccount (optional)
  • Use BTP Login to authenticate
  • Use BTP Target to set the default subaccount target

Create HANA Cloud instance (in other environments)

In free tier or production, choose offering name as "hana-cloud". In trial, choose "hana-cloud-trial".

In free tier, choose plan name as "hana-free". In trial or production, choose "hana".

Bash/Shell:

 

 

btp create services/instance --offering-name hana-cloud --plan-name hana-free --name test-db --parameters '{"data": {"memory": 32, "systempassword": "Welcome100."}}'

 

 

 It will start provisioning an instance in "other environment" and soon the new service instance will be visible from BTP cockpit namely "test-db". 
Alternatively, check the service using the BTP CLI, copy the instance id for future reference.

 

 

btp list services/instance

 

 

or

 

 

btp get services/instance --name test-db

 

 

Start/Stop an instance

To stop:
Bash/Shell:

 

 

btp update services/instance --id 0e269e34-0bb3-47eb-b09b-cc5050dcb3cc --parameters '{"data":{"serviceStopped":true}}'

 

 

To start:
Bash/Shell:

 

 

 

btp update services/instance --id 0e269e34-0bb3-47eb-b09b-cc5050dcb3cc --parameters '{"data":{"serviceStopped":false}}'

 

 

Update whitelisted IPs

For local/hybrid or cross-region developers, whitelisted IPs are needed to be updated on the instance level for connections.

To open connections from all IPs.
Bash/Shell:

 

 

btp update services/instance --id 0e269e34-0bb3-47eb-b09b-cc5050dcb3cc --parameters '{"data":{"whitelistIPs":["0.0.0.0/0"]}}'

 

 

 

Full list of the supported parameters can be found here.

Delete an instance

Bash/Shell:

 

btp delete services/instance --id 0e269e34-0bb3-47eb-b09b-cc5050dcb3cc

 

Limitations:

  • BTP CLI is not able to manage instances created in Cloud Foundry runtime environment at the time of writing. Cloud Foundry CLI is the command line tool for HANA Cloud instances inside the cloud foundry runtime. See my blog here for details.
  • Instance created using BTP CLI is in "other environments" and able to be managed via the SAP HANA Cloud Central, multi-environment edition.
  • BTP CLI can only be used in subaccount which feature B is enabled.

BTP CLI command reference can be found here.

entry.title: Re: Sync BOMs between 2 plants
entry.content: Is there a way to automate this?

entry.title: Re: Deep inserts to entity sets are not supported in SAP...
entry.content: if you are licensed SAP customer, you could download older SDK versions from https://me.sap.com/softwarecenter. But 5.0 version is out of maintenance. the oldest one you could download is 6.0 now.

entry.title: SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM [New OSS: Create HTTPS Connections for SAP Services (SM59)] SOLMAN 7.2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to configure the SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM. I am done with the other configuration and we already registered our sap router to SAP but I am stuck in this step New OSS: Create HTTPS Connections for SAP Services (SM59). Whenever I tried to test the connection in SM59 I get the error:
NIECONN_REFUSED(-10). Can you help me with this? 
Here is my logs in dev_icm.


[Thr 9452] Fri Mar 1 10:32:10:672 2024
[Thr 9452] ***LOG Q0I=> NiBufIConnect: connection pending after 5000ms: connect (10035: WSAEWOULDBLOCK: Resource temporarily unavailable) [D:/depot/bas/753_REL/src/base/ni/nibuf.cpp 4593]
[Thr 9452] *** ERROR => NiBufIConnect: non-buffered connect pending after 5000ms (hdl 114;:3299) [nibuf.cpp 4604]
[Thr 9452] *** WARNING => Connect to /H/<public ip>/S/3299/H/169.145.197.110/S/3299/H/notesdownloads.sap.com:443 failed: NIECONN_REFUSED(-10) {0002855c} {root-id=001517DB29811EDEB5FD50E3381320B9} [icxxconn.c 2715]
[Thr 9452] GUI T13_U1243_M0, 001, 2023-0044, CUB-051N, time=10:32:05, W1, program=STC_SCN_MAINTAIN, high priority, memory=0, tasks=1, appl info=, tcode=STC01
[Thr 9452] role: Client, protocol: HTTPS

However, in the app "Manage Project Demand" > Resources Demand > Resources Assignments > the list of resourcs is empty. How can I enable existing employees available as Resources for the project team?

entry.title: Re: Getting Deep inserts to entity sets are not supported...
entry.content: pAre you using offline odata or online odata. For offline, deep insert is only supported begining 5.1.

have you checked your network connectivity? Firewalls? Routers? Name resolution?

 

cheers,

Kay

entry.title: Re: Timesheet : Create Task option not available

the unstaffed project checked box is ticked now. May I know if this "Entry Profile" will need to be assigned at where?

entry.title: Re: Production Version
entry.content:
Hi,

Alternatively without having to use multiple production versions, you can select a different work center at the time of recording operation confirmation  by changing the default work center (CO11N).

You may need to enable selection of work center in your confirmation profile  via OPK0

entry.title: Re: BOM component selection
entry.content:
Hi,

you can check on the alternative item group functionality, refer the below blog

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/concept-of-alternative-item-group-functionality-in-bom/ba-p/13271091#:~:text=When%20there%20are%20several%20alternative,reservations%20are%20generated%20against%20orders.

entry.title: SAP Odata Call from UI5
entry.content:
hi Experts,

I am new to UI5 and trying to a create app with a view with an input and a simple display only form.  The manifest is linked to backend odata SAP service.

Below is the Flow of the application :

AccountNumber( Input field) --> Get the AccountNumber from the Input and tag it to the filter to the SAP odata service and populated the response of the api in the form.

below is the example: 

<uri> / sap/opu/odata/SAP/BPACCBAL/BillAccDetailSet?$filter=(AccountNumber eq '1234567890')

FYI: This specific filter works in the postman so the service is up and running.

Below is the xml view with the form:

<form:SimpleForm
                        id="sf2"
                        maxContainerCols="2"
                        editable="false"
                        layout="ResponsiveGridLayout"
                        labelSpanL="3"
                        labelSpanM="3"
                        emptySpanL="4"
                        emptySpanM="4"
                        columnsL="1"
                        columnsM="1">
                        <form:content>
                            <Label text="{i18n>ObjectSupplierName}"/>
                            <Text text="{AccountNumber}"/>
                            <Label text="{i18n>ObjectSupplierName}"/>
                            <Text text="{BillingName}"/>
                            <Label text="{i18n>ObjectSupplierAddress}"/>
                            <Text text="{Address1}  {Address2} {City} {Zipcode} "/>
                        </form:content>
</form:SimpleForm>
 
Manifest:
    "dataSources": {
      "bpService": {
        "uri": "sap/opu/odata/SAP/BPACCBAL/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [],
          "localUri": "localService/metadata.xml",
          "odataVersion": "2.0"
        }
      }

 

is there a way to apply the filter and bind  to the form directly ?

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Bengaluru - My first engagement as speaker for the SAP Community Event
entry.content:
It was a privilege to attend my first SIT event in SAP Labs Bengaluru as a Speaker. It was an early start with the venue buzzing with activities as early as 7:00 am on 17th February. This SIT had 1400+ attendees. I started on my own Journey as Developer advocate on SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP), ABAP Cloud and SAP RAP topic 8 months ago. I am grateful to the SIT team and platform to provide me an opportunity to address the SAP Community Members on my favourite topic of "SAP CAP Journey Beginner to Expert". Presentation Slide-deck 

 

Speaking on SAP CAP Journey from Beginner to Expert

Track2 Session 2 participants

It was the great starting Keynote by Sindhu Gangadharan followed by parallel sessions on 8 Tracks.
I was presenting my session on Track2 at 10:45 - 11:30 am. I still remember the room was full of the participants and many of the participants also stood around the room as all the seats were occupied.
There were some great questions asked. The time just flew as we had so much to share but in limited time. I thank all of you for you participation and making the whole SIT event so successful. Hopefully the session helped you to take further strides as beginners and experts on the SAP CAP Topic.

Apart from speaking at the event I was also representing our SAP Developer Advocacy and Relationship – SAP Ecosystem & Community team at SAP CodeJam booth. #SAP #CodeJam is a global event brought to you by the SAP Developer Advocates worldwide.
We have the CodeJam offered in APJ Region as well since July of 2023. We did 9+ CodeJams since last year in APJ region. We still meet many community members who are not aware of our free CodeJam offered in the APJ region. Please help to spread the word about the SAP Community driven SAP CodeJam events offering from SAP.

Met the SAP Developer Advocate team at SIT Bengaluru?

Developer Advocates@CodeJam booth

Attendees trying ABAP RAP, SAP CAP and SAP Build Tutorials Hands-on

Networking with SAP Community Members

Developer Advocates at the CodeJam booth. It was great networking with the community members. Some participants also tried out tutorials at our booth on ABAP Cloud - RAP, SAP CAP and SAP Build Topics.

In case you would like to host a CodeJam you can start a discussion at Discussion area of SAP Community Group for SAP CodeJam. or just reach out to any one of the Developer Advocates. @ajay_soreng  @eshrinivasan@Shilpa_Shankar @Rekha_DR  @sheenamk @thomas_jung @josh_bentley 

Developer Advocates for APJ Region

We had some fun at the intriguing board game on SAP BTP.

Fun@BTP Diamond board game

Last but not the least, I would like to thank Sindhu, @maheshpalavalli , Abhishek and all the organisers for their tremendous support in making it a successful and engaging SIT Event.

entry.title: Re: There is a difference between the document total and...
entry.content:
Dear edy_simon,

This issue has been documented in SAP Note 3439522 which will be released soon.

The issue is supposed to be fixed in Feature Package 2405 of SAP Business One Version 10.0.

Be advised that the time-frame is subject to change without any further notice.

If you do not have any further question, kindly help to close this thread.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Add multiple entries to Outbound queue in SMQ1
entry.content:
Greetings all,

In ECC, I implemented the logic that creating an outbound queue ( which can check in tcode SMQ1 or table TRFCQOUT) and triggers the scheduling of a background job for this queue with a 5-munites delay. Upon the re-execution of this logic within the 5-munites, additional entries are appended to this queue name. 

The primary objective of this implementation is to streamline the process by consolidating multiple entries under a single background job. It helps to improve the performance by minimize the number of background job running parallel at the same time. 

Following the example of below sap document, everything is working fine in ECC system.

However, It doesn't working properly in S4 HANA system. Within 5-munite delay time, if this logic was executed again, then this queue name has gone immediately (cannot add a 3rd entry) and the background job is removed (cannot see it in SM37). 

I am still struggling with this issue 😞 and uncertain if there are any configurations for background jobs in S4 Hana system that could provide assistance 

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-us/48/bb8094b22337e3e10000000a42189d/content.htm?loaded_from_frameset=true

 

Here is the logic implementing: 

 

* Get the latest entry of outbound queue into ls_qout (can use FM TRFC_QOUT_OVERVIEW_STATES)
* Based on ls_qout, we can get the start time of the latest queue (ls_qout-ftime)
* in order to know this queue is still deplaying for 5-munite or not 
IF ls_qout IS NOT INITIAL.
  IF ls_qout-ftime + 300 > sy-uzeit. "300 seconds = 5 munites
    lv_qname = ls_qout-qname
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.
 
* Set the new queue name if it cannot find any queue which is still deplaying
* And also set the flag lv_schedule_backgroundjob = 'X'
IF lv_qname IS INITIAL.
  lv_qname = 'assign_the_queue_name'.
  lv_schedule_backgroundjob = 'X'.
ENDIF.
 
* Initializing the TRFC Queue
CALL FUNCTION 'TRFC_QUEUE_INITIALIZE' .
 
* Set the queue name for the outbound queue
 CALL FUNCTION 'TRFC_SET_QUEUE_NAME'
    EXPORTING
      qname  = lv_qname
      nosend = space.
 
* Call tRFC without destination because I need it running locally in this system
 CALL FUNCTION 'rfc_function'
    IN BACKGROUND TASK ...
 
* Schedule the background job starts in next 5 munites for only the first one execution
IF lv_schedule_backgroundjob = 'X'.
        lv_start_date = sy-datum.
        lv_start_time = sy-uzeit + 300.
 
        CALL FUNCTION 'START_OF_BACKGROUNDTASK'
          EXPORTING
            startdate = lv_start_date
            starttime = lv_start_time.
 
ENDIF.
 
* At the time of the COMMIT WORK, the qRFC manager creates a counter for the LUW
  COMMIT WORK.

entry.title: Re: syntax query
entry.content:
Hi Francisco,

the sysntax is almost the same. It differs  how:
FMS
Query-Generator
Post Transaction Notification
Uses Variables

I recommend this book

Mastering SQL Queries for SAP Business One by Gordon Du

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
Hi @VanessaLi,

We are planning to do it like that as well (connect SF Test to Prod Teams) and test out the SF app in Teams for selected users first but I have a question / concern around the user mapping step.

If we map Test SF users with Prod Teams (AD Azure) users, would there be any unexpected issues?

The users in our Test SF won't be aligned to that of Prod Teams, will the user mapping all the sudden create our Test SF users in Prod Teams (AD Azure)?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Batch Managment
entry.content:
Hi,

Can your share the requirement behind the use of 2 batches for FG?

During order confirmation you can split or do multiple confirmations , when there is a requirement to classify batches, if it is based on the confirmation.

entry.title: Re: SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM [New OSS: Create HTTPS Conn...
entry.content:
Hi, Thanks for the response.

Yes, we can ping the IP of SAP from our server. See the response from the ping.

PS C:\Users\Administrator> Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 169.145.197.110 -por
t 3299


ComputerName : 169.145.197.110
RemoteAddress : 169.145.197.110
RemotePort : 3299
InterfaceAlias : Ethernet 2
SourceAddress : 
PingSucceeded : True
PingReplyDetails (RTT) : 40 ms
TcpTestSucceeded : True

entry.title: Re: SBPA Automations not able to detect SAP Easy Access S...

entry.title: Adding new fields to Characteristics catalogue.
entry.content:
Dear aATP experts, we have requirement to add new characteristics for Alternative base confirmations & Location substitutions.

Please help us with information How to add new characteristic (ex: Zip Code, Transportation Zone) to catalogue.

 

Thank you.

Satwik Joshi

entry.title: How to configure file store to a different location in crystal server 2020?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Members,

I am currently running crystal report 2016 server. My current filestore location is at "C:\Program Files\Business Objects\BusinessObjects Enterprise 11.4\FileStore". I would like to re-configure to "E" drive. Would anyone please share me what all steps needs to be followed for this process?

Thank You.

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
@Ethan_Dai No it won't create new users in Prod Teams. The mapping is always done on existing users from both sides.

If there are no matching email addresses between Test SF and Prod Teams then the mapping will simply fail. Therefore for this testing, you need to make sure that the users in Prod Teams exists as well in SF Test.

entry.title: Re: Error - Multiple lines are only supported for printing and in print view
entry.content: There is no need to reply on a 11 year old post that is already solved.

entry.title: Re: capture filename from azure storage adapter
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

can you help with above request?

entry.title: Re: Where can I find learning materials for SAP S/4HANA for group reporting?
entry.content:
Hi @Margit_Wagner ,

The community page link mentioned earlier is not working. Can you please provide the updated/correct link?

Thanks,

Niranjan Kamishetti(NK)

entry.title: I_CUSTRETITEMPRICINGELEMENTTP CDS View Not Permitted in the custom logic
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

For Credit Memo Custom Output forms Object developing purpose, we are trying to fetch some condition types of values from CDS view I_CUSTRETITEMPRICINGELEMENTTP. However, in the custom logic system giving us a error that "The use of CDS Entry I_CUSTRETITEMPRICINGELEMENTTP is not permitted".

By using eclipse, we also see that this CDS view is Projection View which is not allowed as base object for this entry type.

Therefore, we would like to know that instead of the mentioned CDS view, is there any other CDS view available from which we can be able to take condition types of values. Moreover, how can we achieve our required condition types of values (such as VAT, Supplementary Duty, TDS). Please let us know the solution.

Thanks and Regards.

Hasnat

entry.title: Re: SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM [New OSS: Create HTTPS Conn...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The NIECONN_REFUSED error indicates the incorrect router string. It's needed to verify with the SAP network team the correct router string from the configured system to SAP links. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Operation Configuration Webinar Series
entry.content:
WHAT IS IT ABOUT?

The SAP Cloud ALM Configuration Webinar virtual Series is designed to offer in-depth insights into streamlining SAP Cloud ALM capabilities for practical implementation. Its primary aim is to provide valuable guidance on configuring managed systems, services, and activating operational use cases effectively.

The series covers various topics under the umbrella of operation and implementation capabilities of SAP Cloud ALM:

OPERATION

Episode 1 – Keep track of your integration well-being using SAP Integration & Exception Monitoring: This session delves into Integration & Exception Monitoring, bridging the gap between IT and Business. It explores the correlation of integration artifacts, granting comprehensive visibility into interface calls and message flows across diverse cloud services and systems. This deep dive into SAP Cloud ALM's capabilities expedites project implementation and ensures operational continuity in SAP's hybrid landscape. Santhana Krishnan

WATCH NOW

Episode 2 – Utilize Intelligent Event Processing within SAP Cloud ALM for downstream activities:

Here, we explore the onboarding (managed system configuration) of SAP SuccessFactors to SAP Cloud ALM. Also, focusing on Alert and Event management within the platform. Intelligent Event Processing efficiently handles events from varied sources, offering unified event processing based on rules, centralised event handling, and intelligent event correlation for the downstream activities like Email, Chat notifications, integration to incident management applications(service now and third party). Resmi K S

WATCH NOW

Episode 3 – Detect anomalies in your business and technical jobs with SAP Cloud ALM Job & Automation monitoring:

This session aims to guide users in configuring managed systems and services, with a specific emphasis on Job & Automation Monitoring. It facilitates a unified user experience and monitoring pattern across different products, proving especially beneficial in integration scenarios involving multiple products of the SAP Intelligent Suite. Venkatesh Ramachandran

WATCH NOW

Episode 4 – Ensure the smooth operation of your business KPIs with SAP Cloud ALM's Business Process Monitoring:

The Business Process Monitoring application in SAP Cloud ALM supports the detect-to-correct lifecycle of SAP Cloud solutions, ensuring smooth operations and improving the quality and performance of business process execution. Participants gain insights into addressing anomalies detected during monitoring. Stephanie Jerch

WATCH NOW

Episode 5 - Enhance visibility into your SAP BTP Applications using SAP Cloud ALM in lines of Observability:

Expanding its capabilities, SAP Cloud ALM now centrally operates SaaS applications and custom extensions on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). This includes tools that minimize the time to detect and resolve issues, offering observability for both custom-built and SAP BTP-based SaaS applications. Muthu Hariharan M

WATCH NOW

Episode 6 – Monitor your critical business application's availability and performance proactively with SUM in SAP Cloud ALM:

This episode elaborates on Synthetic User Monitoring, concentrating on web application performance and availability from a client-side perspective. It helps in proactively identifying performance and availability issues, guiding users through a seamless configuration process. In this episode, you will learn about configuring synthetic user monitoring scenarios along with the runner setup. @Christophe garcia

PART 1 WATCH NOW

PART 2 WATCH NOW

Episode 7 – Simplify change management by integrating various deployment tools and orchestrating them with SAP Change and Deployment Management:

This episode sheds light on overview setup and configuration of SAP Cloud ALM change and deployment capabilities, integrating various deployment tools to orchestrate smooth transport requests across the entire implementation landscape. Moritz Gysler

WATCH NOW

Episode 8- Monitor the availability of your hybrid landscape and its related events using SAP Cloud ALM's Business Service Management:

Discover how this solution, efficiently handles business services, cloud services, and technical systems. This offers overview of current service statuses, forwards events to monitoring apps, sends email notifications, and integrates with IT Service Management. Patrick Richarts Anne Joseph

WATCH NOW

Ep 9: Ensure governance across your system landscapes by adhering organisational policies at the host, application, and database levels with SAP Cloud ALM's Configuration and Security Analysis:

In this episode, we detailed into SAP Cloud ALM Configuration & Security Analysis. Discover how this solution helps in evaluating and enhancing the configurations and security méasures of an organization's IT infrastructure. It involves identifying vulnerabilities, implementing best practices, and ensuring compliance with security standards to protect data and prevent breaches. Hendrik Mueller

WATCH NOW

Ep 10: Ensure end users have clear visibility into the availability and performance of your SAP applications using SAP Cloud ALM Real User Monitoring: This episode explores the benefits of transparency and performance in user interactions. Learn how Real User Monitoring supports monitoring request executions from different platforms with a unified user experience. Understand the importance of historical values in rating request executions and how it can help both IT and Business users. @Thomas holz

WATCH NOW

Conclusion

SAP Cloud ALM helps you to implement and operate intelligent cloud and hybrid business solutions.

You benefit from an out-of-the-box, native cloud solution, designed as the central entry point to manage your SAP landscape with content-driven guided implementation and highly automated operations.

SAP Cloud ALM is included in your cloud subscription containing Enterprise Support, cloud edition and in SAP Enterprise Support. Request you to look into the recordings to get deeper understanding of Operations capability within SAP Cloud ALM.

We have upcoming SAP Cloud ALM implementation webinar series, do register and attend:

Date

Topic

Registration Link

Feb 22nd

 Manage Projects Efficiently with SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

Feb 29th

 Unlock the value of the new solution documentation in SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

March 11th

 Manage your processes and Run Fit-to-Standard workshops with SAP Cloud ALM

                

          Register

March 14th

 Orchestrate your test activities with SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

March 21st

 Make use of Tricentis Test Automation with SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

March 28th

 Benefit from Analytics in SAP Cloud ALM - from overview to traceability

          Register

April 4th

 Get the latest of Change Request Management in SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

April 11th

 Make use of S/4HANA Test Automation with SAP Cloud ALM

          Register

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne Mar '24
entry.content:
Time to raise a toast to the SAP Dev Community in Melbourne. Let's take the opportunity to catch up as we get well into 2024. No agenda, no requirements, just come along and be involved in the way you would like.

To coincide with the SAP BTP Innovation Day in Melbourne on Thursday 21st March 2024 at 5:30pm at The Bank on Collins

 Ground floor/394 Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000.

 

When you arrive, you can ask for a booking under "SAP Regulars Table" 😉

I am really looking forward to sharing this informal community get together. Pass the word around!

See you there.

Ben.

entry.title: Re: Add icon to Action label in RAP
entry.content: Adding icon is supported - please see V4 specific section "Rendering Buttons with Icon Instead of Text" in page I shared above for more information!

entry.title: Re: vendor master list by purchasing group
entry.content: It doesn't work. It exports a PO list. Not the vendor list with purchasing group.

entry.title: Re: list of vendors by purchasing group
entry.content: cannot find the field about purchasing group via MKVZ

entry.title: Re: SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing – Overview and Key Resources for Integration Setup (SUP_EL
entry.content:
For SAP-internal employees, if the learning asset link does not work, you are missing an authorization for the SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support. Please utilize the Internal Edition of SAP Learning Hub

Note:  First time users will be prompted to subscribe. The subscribe button is at the bottom of the page. Once you subscribe, you will get instant access to SAP Learning Hub, internal edition.

entry.title: Re: How to find SAP APIs for SAP S/4HANA 3-tier extensibility model

entry.content:
Hello Jacob,

No, this works also with 'regular' ATP, not only with advanced ATP.

Best regards,

Michael

can it be automatically created while hiring an employee.

 

Can anyone help me with the configuration of this..????

entry.title: Re: Depreciation Base Method 0007 and 0011
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

It's a long time ask and I haven't got any logical reply from anyone on the BASE method used for depreciation calculations. So can anyone please help me to understand the difference between two depreciation BASE method variants i.e. "0007- percentage from life V$ 0011- percentage from useful life" with real time examples. Also when we create SLM depreciation key which BASE method is recommended and when we create WDV depreciation key which BASE method is recommended and why?

entry.title: Re: Quantity fixed for delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

I would suggest to check the scheduling agreement option, where the release schedules shall be created as required. Refer the documentation # Scheduling Agreement Releases: Process and Materials Planning and Scheduling Agreement Release 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS1: TM master data based Sales Order Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi @Michael_Haase 

great blog! Thanks a lot for those more in-depth insights.

For us, there is one question which comes up here immediately: Does this also mean, that we do not necessarily need the SD Route anymore? Those transit & loading times could be managed by TM Objects. But the transportation lead time (especially the difference between planning seafreight and road freight..) still depends on the SD-Route, isn't it?

If so, is it the plan to manage this also with tm objects in later releases?

Thank you!

 

BR,

Christoph

entry.title: Re: Linkage of personnel number with BP & Employee vendor...
entry.content: Can all three be linked ( BP , Employee Vendor account which is created inside BP , Personnel Number) can all three be linked & Created together

entry.title: Re: Service Entry Sheet invoice verification
entry.content:
Hi,

If you use service based IV flag in the invoice tab, it will get you the invoice at service level - you may test the same.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Why data type used for private attribute should be de...
entry.content: Hi Rossi, Question updated, maybe I didn't make it clear.

entry.title: Re: Build Apps - 500 Error
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/what-s-new-for-sap-build-apps-enhanced-fusion-development/ba-p/13591981 This should resolve. "If you currently have an SAP Build Apps project deployed to SAP Build Work Zone, you should not encounter any issues. However, once you update your app, create a new build and deploy it to your SAP Build Work Zone page you will notice that access to the app will not work. Note: All SAP Build Apps users must make the changes described below before you deploy and integrate a new app version to SAP Build Work Zone, otherwise you risk losing access to your projects. "

entry.title: Re: Defaulting Due By Date in Service Requests (SMRQ) - S...
entry.content: To set a default "Due By" date as +5 days from the current date during Service Request creation in an SAP environment, you would typically use the SAP Project Reference Object (SPRO) to configure this. In SPRO, navigate through the Implementation Guide (IMG) to find the module relevant to Service Requests (likely under Customer Service, Plant Maintenance, or CRM). You might need to adjust date calculation settings or implement a custom solution using user exits or BAdIs with ABAP coding. There's no direct path in SPRO as it varies by the specific SAP module and version, so you'll need to explore the relevant module configurations or consult with an ABAP developer for a custom-coded solution. Always test changes in a non-production environment first.

entry.title: Re: SAP hana_ml ARIMAX with SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Hello, These blogs have examples on using hana_ml in AI Core, for scheduling and inference via REST-APi

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-ai-core-scheduling-sap-hana-machine-learning/ba-p/13577484

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-ai-core-realtime-inference-with-sap-hana-machine-learning/ba-p/13578035

entry.title: SAP BTP Cockpit Developer Account
entry.content:
Hello, I created an account to create SAP Build App via SAP BTP Cockpit.
As an admin, I can log in to the Lobby section, but I open accounts for other people to make developments, but they cannot log in to the Lobby section.
I looked at the documentation on this issue, but I couldn't figure it out. Can you help me?
Thanks

My screenshots are as follows.

SAP BTP Cockpit

SAP BTP Cockpit

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Cockpit - Subaccount
SAP BTP Cockpit Subaccounts

 

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Lobby

Build Lobby Login Page

entry.title: Re: Automated Emails when Service Request is Assigned to...
entry.content:
Hi dvan1,

I would recommend following below KBAs to configure your email actions/conditions for SMRQ, but it's recommended to copy standard SMRQ to your own transaction type like ZMRQ to do the changes:
2434880 - How to configure email notifications in ChaRM and ITSM - Solution Manager
3103731 - How to work with Action Definition and Action Conditions
Following above instructions to do necessary changes for the email notification configurations.
Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Please tell me about Reset Transaction Data.

can you explain in more detail what exactly you mean with the term "transaction data can be deleted by using the application in the subject line".

 

Do you have bank statement items which were posted and you ask if these are reset using the application Reset Transaction Data?

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

Abul Hasnat

entry.title: Re: SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD: Text in the Axis lable is not fu...
entry.content:
Hi @former_member749303,

if the label is truncated, you can drag the line of axis to get the label expanded.

the data will be expanded.

entry.title: Link to external url in sac table
entry.content:
Dear all,

we have a SAC story with detailed document number (each row is related to one document number). We would like to click on a link that open a pdf document showing the invoice related to the document number. 
what would be the best way to achieve that ?

i know that it is not possible to have image in cell.  We know to pass parameters to run external url but we are looking for the best way to display a clickable link. 
thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Script to another table - Sap Analytic cloud
entry.content:
Hello Daniel,

to be honest, I don't understand your description, what you want to do...

I recommend you start with an easy example, and from there you can go on:

https://help.sap.com/doc/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/2022.12/en-us/b9b58a72342845cd91c14fd2c2b9a06c.html

FYI: There is also 1 Open SAP Course regarding Analytics Designer... I think "SAC3" it was, if I remember right.

BR, Martin
